tasks.title: Fix gpt-5 temperature guard
tasks.description: Extend is_o_series_model() to cover gpt-5 models or drop custom temperature entirely. Caused Round 6 API failure. Files: debate.py (line 994), models.py.
acceptance_criteria: gpt-5.5 API calls no longer fail with temperature error
Existing o-series temperature guard still works

tasks.title: Wire --preserve-intent into debate rounds 2+
tasks.description: Add --preserve-intent to debate.py critique invocations from Round 2 onward in phases/03-debate.md. Prevents models from silently removing spec content.
acceptance_criteria: Phase 03 Step 4 critique invocations include --preserve-intent for round >= 2
Round 1 does NOT use --preserve-intent (requirements validation, not content preservation)

tasks.title: Update parse_models error message
tasks.description: Reorder no-models-configured error message to list CLI models first, API models second. Match docstring change. Files: debate.py (lines 846-880).
acceptance_criteria: Error message lists Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Claude CLI before API key providers

tasks.title: Add diff action to inter-round workflow
tasks.description: After incorporating critiques into spec-draft-v(N+1), run debate.py diff --previous vN.md --current v(N+1).md and include diff in round summary. Files: phases/03-debate.md.
acceptance_criteria: Phase 03 includes diff step between round incorporation and guardrail check
Diff output shown to user as part of round summary

tasks.title: Wire --focus into round progression
tasks.description: Pass --focus flags matching round focus: R2=architecture, R3=performance/security. Makes round focus concrete for opponent models. Files: phases/03-debate.md.
acceptance_criteria: Round 3 critique invocation includes --focus performance or --focus security

tasks.title: Wire --telegram into critique invocations
tasks.description: Add --telegram --poll-timeout 120 to critique calls. Remove manual urllib notification blocks from phase instructions. Biggest manual-step reduction but needs config verification. Files: phases/03-debate.md, phases/05-gauntlet.md. Dependency: verify telegram_bot.py config matches per-project bot setup.
acceptance_criteria: telegram_bot.py reads per-project Telegram config (not hardcoded)
Manual urllib notification blocks removed from phase 03 and 05
Telegram notification includes round results and polls for feedback

tasks.title: Wire --persona into targeted rounds
tasks.description: Document when to use --persona for targeted critique after Round 3 (security engineer, oncall-engineer based on concerns raised). Files: phases/03-debate.md, phases/05-gauntlet.md.
acceptance_criteria: Phase 03 documents optional --persona usage for Round 4+
Persona selection is based on concerns raised in Round 3, not hardcoded
